qa_pairs.question: When does the annual account renewal process typically take place?
qa_pairs.answer: The annual account renewal process typically takes place in the spring.

qa_pairs.question: What are the primary objectives of the annual account renewal process?
qa_pairs.answer: The annual account renewal process ensures that accounts no longer needed are deactivated and that information required by funding agencies and partners is collected for reporting purposes.

qa_pairs.question: Why is the information collected about researchers and their results considered important?
qa_pairs.answer: The information collected about researchers and their results is important for reports to funding agencies and the digital research infrastructure (DRI) ecosystem.

qa_pairs.question: How will active account holders be notified about the account renewal?
qa_pairs.answer: If you have an active account, an email will be sent during the account renewal period directing you to the account renewal form.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if a user allows their CCDB account to expire?
qa_pairs.answer: If users let their CCDB account expire, they will no longer be able to log in to any of our systems.

qa_pairs.question: What are the consequences if a Principal Investigator (PI) allows their account to expire?
qa_pairs.answer: If a Principal Investigator (PI) allows their account to expire, their account as well as the account of all users they sponsor will also be deactivated.

qa_pairs.question: How can a deactivated account be reactivated?
qa_pairs.answer: Accounts can be reactivated at any time by logging into CCDB at [https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/](https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/) and completing the account renewal form.

qa_pairs.question: What should users do if they don't want to renew their CCDB account but still need to recover their files?
qa_pairs.answer: Users that do not want to renew their CCDB account but still want to recover their files can request a temporary extension by sending an email to support@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more information about account renewals?
qa_pairs.answer: More information about account renewals can be found on our Account Renewals FAQ page or by contacting renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact for questions regarding account renewals?
qa_pairs.answer: You can contact renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca for more information about account renewals.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL to log in to CCDB for account reactivation?
qa_pairs.answer: The URL to log in to CCDB is [https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/](https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/).

qa_pairs.question: What is the email address for requesting a temporary extension for file recovery?
qa_pairs.answer: The email address for requesting a temporary extension for file recovery is support@tech.alliancecan.ca.
